name: Rotorua Central
description: 罗托鲁瓦拥有世界上最壮观的地热景观之一，同时是毛利文化的中心，也是无数户外和极限运动活动的门户。全年皆宜，但地热景观使其成为完美的冬季目的地。可通过飞机、汽车或巴士轻松抵达，距奥克兰约3小时车程。
descriptionEn: Rotorua is home to some of the most spectacular geothermal landscapes in the world. It is also a hub for Māori culture and a gateway to countless outdoor and adrenaline attractions. A year-round destination, with geothermal landscapes making it the perfect winter destination.
highlights: 全年皆宜的旅游目的地
